sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
epic_coverage: Core Infrastructure & DevOps,AI-Powered SOW Automation,Financial Engine & Payments
key_deliverables: Terraform Infrastructure; SOW Upload API; SOW Processing Worker Shell; Basic SOW Review UI
demo_objectives: Upload a PDF SOW and see it land in S3 and trigger a DB record
success_criteria: Infrastructure deployed; Upload API functional; Worker consuming messages
risk_factors: AWS Quota limits; DevOps complexity setup time
mitigation_strategies: Early quota request; Start with simplified Terraform modules
external_dependencies: AWS Account Access; Stripe API Keys
integration_windows: Day 8-9: Worker integration with Upload Service
burndown_target: Steady progress on infra and backend first

sprint_goal: Finalize AI Processing and Financial Logic
key_deliverables: Working AI Extraction; Payment Webhooks; Ledger UI; Completed SOW Review
demo_objectives: Full SOW flow: Upload -> AI Extract -> Review -> Approve. Payment flow simulation.
success_criteria: AI extraction accuracy > 85%; Payment webhooks handling events correctly
risk_factors: AI Prompt Tuning time sink; Stripe Webhook local testing complexity
mitigation_strategies: Timebox prompt engineering; Use Stripe CLI fixtures
integration_windows: Day 7: Frontend/Backend SOW Integration. Day 9: Payment End-to-End.
burndown_target: Heavy testing load at end of sprint
